consent.error: Could not save consent. Please try again.
consent.ai.title: Health & AI consent
consent.ai.desc: Kaify processes fitness-related data and uses AI (including third-party providers). This is not medical advice.
consent.ai.health: I consent to processing of my health and fitness-related data for coaching features.
consent.ai.processing: I consent to automated AI analysis of my messages and optional photos.
consent.ai.footer: You can withdraw consent in Settings. See
consent.disclaimer.banner: AI coaches are not doctors. Always consult a qualified professional before changing diet or exercise.
consent.photo.title: Photo analysis consent
consent.photo.desc: Your photo is sent to AI providers for one-time analysis and is not stored as a public image.
consent.photo.checkbox: I consent to analyzing this photo for fitness coaching.
consent.revoke.title: Withdraw AI consent
consent.revoke.desc: Stop AI and health-data processing. Chat and photo analysis will be blocked until you accept again.
consent.revoke.push.title: Withdraw push notification consent
consent.revoke.push.desc: Stop push reminders and streak alerts. You can re-enable them in Notifications.
consent.revoke.push.active: Push notification consent is currently active.
consent.revoke.push.inactive: Push notification consent is not active.
settings.delete.title: Delete account
settings.delete.desc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data (GDPR/KVKK right to erasure).
settings.delete.error: Account could not be deleted. Complete MFA verification and try again.
cookies.banner.title: We use cookies
cookies.banner.short: Essential cookies are always used. Optional cookies are for analytics only.
cookies.banner.legal_prefix: By accepting you agree to our
chat.disclaimer.footer: Tréneri nie sú lekári a môžu sa mýliť. Nezabudni prispôsobiť cvičenie a stravu sebe.

landing.hero.title: Váš AI Fitness tím
landing.hero.subtitle: Zoznámte sa s Kaiom, Alexom, Mayou a Leom – vašimi osobnými trénermi, ktorí vás poznajú, posúvajú na vás a udržujú vás na správnej ceste.
landing.features.title: Všetko, čo potrebujete
landing.features.subtitle: Sledujte, analyzujte a zdokonaľujte sa pomocou štatistík založených na AI.
landing.coaches.title: Zoznámte sa so svojimi koučmi

landing.cta.subtitle: Pridajte sa už k tisíckam na ich fitness ceste.

notif.title: Notifications
notif.panel.subtitle: Streaks, milestones and updates from your coaches
notif.empty.title: You're all caught up
notif.empty.subtitle: Your streaks, milestones and reminders will show up here.
notif.streak_risk.title: Your streak is at risk!
notif.streak_risk.body: You haven't checked in today. Don't lose your {streak}-day streak — open the app now!
notif.streak_milestone.title: {days}-day streak!
notif.streak_milestone.body: Incredible consistency — you've shown up {days} days in a row. Keep it going!
notif.kai_level_up.title: Kai leveled up!
notif.kai_level_up.body: Kai is now Level {level}. Come see the new look!
notif.freezie_earned.title: You earned a Freezie!
notif.freezie_earned.body: 7-day streak reward. Miss a day and your streak stays safe.
notif.weekly_summary.title: Your weekly recap is ready
notif.weekly_summary.body: See your progress this week and set the pace for the next one.
notif.water_reminder.title: Time to hydrate
notif.water_reminder.body: Drink a glass of water to hit today's goal.
notif.praise.title: You're crushing it!
notif.praise.body: {streak} days strong with K.AIFY — that's something most people never manage. Proud of you!
notif.push.enable_desc: Get your streak and reminders on your phone even when the app is closed.
notif.push.enabled_desc: Push notifications will be sent to this device.
notif.push.denied: Notifications are blocked. Allow them in your browser settings to enable.
notif.push.consent_checkbox: I consent to push notifications for streak reminders and app alerts (withdraw anytime in Settings).
notif.retention.warning_body: Some of your older chat or activity data will be deleted in about 30 days per our retention policy. Export your data anytime in Settings.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check your input and try again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do this.
errors.NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find what you were looking for.
errors.CONFLICT: This conflicts with the current state. Please refresh and try again.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: You're going too fast. Please wait a moment and try again.
errors.INTERNAL_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE: AI features are temporarily unavailable. Please try again in a few minutes.
chat.error.photoFormat: This format isn't supported. Use JPEG, PNG or WEBP (not iPhone HEIC).
login.error.failed: Couldn't send the sign-in link. Please try again.
mfa.verify.title: Two-factor verification
mfa.verify.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
mfa.verify.logout: Sign out and use another account
mfa.error.invalid: Invalid code. Check your authenticator app and try again.
mfa.settings.title: Security & MFA
mfa.settings.enabled: Enabled — your account requires a code at sign-in.
mfa.settings.desc: Add an authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.) for an extra layer of protection against account takeover.
mfa.enroll.scan: Scan this QR code with your authenticator app, then enter the 6-digit code.
settings.security.sessions.title: Session management
settings.security.sessions.desc: Sign out other devices if you lost a device or suspect unauthorized access.
settings.export.title: Data export
settings.export.desc: Download all your account data as JSON (GDPR/KVKK).
chest.daily_desc: Free chest every 24h — win gems and freezies!
chest.error: Could not load chest. Tap retry.
chest.claim_failed: Couldn't open the chest. Please try again.
streak.drama.at_risk.title: Your {streak}-day streak is at risk!
streak.drama.at_risk.body: You haven't checked in today. Kai is worried — check in now to save your streak.
streak.drama.freezie.title: Kai will use a freezie!
streak.drama.freezie.body: No check-in for {days} days. A freezie can save your streak — hurry!
streak.drama.lost.title: Your streak is shaky…
streak.drama.lost.body: You've been away {days} days with no freezies left. Check in and let Kai help.

admin.link.self_heal.desc: Circuit breaker, degraded mode, AI diagnostics

admin.notifications.title: Broadcast notification
admin.notifications.subtitle: Deliver a system message to every Kaify user (in-app + push when enabled).
admin.notifications.field_id_hint: Reuse the same ID to avoid duplicate sends to users who already received this campaign.
admin.notifications.confirm: Send "{title}" to ALL users? This cannot be undone.
admin.notifications.error: Broadcast failed. Check logs and try again.
admin.notifications.note: Text is sent as written — it is not auto-translated. For multilingual campaigns, prefer short English or run separate sends per locale later.
